tools.name: browser_open
tools.description: Open a URL in a headless browser session. Fetches the page with Chrome/Firefox/Safari header profiles, manages a cookie jar, follows redirects, parses HTML. Returns title, links, forms, visible text, and HTML. If the page detects as requiring JavaScript, use browser_cdp_open instead. No external dependencies required.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"URL to fetch"},"profile":{"type":"string","enum":["chrome","firefox","safari"],"description":"Browser header profile (default: chrome)"},"headers":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"string"},"description":"Extra HTTP headers to send"}},"required":["url"]}

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Follow a link on the current page in a browser session. Identify the link by index (from browser_open's links list) or by text_match substring.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string"},"link_index":{"type":"integer","description":"Index from the links array returned by browser_open"},"text_match":{"type":"string","description":"Substring to match against link text"}},"required":["session_id"]}

tools.name: browser_query
tools.description: Run a CSS selector against the current page and return matching elements. Use attr to extract a specific attribute value (e.g. attr='href' to get link URLs).

tools.name: browser_cdp_open
tools.description: Open a URL in a real headless Chrome browser via CDP. Executes JavaScript, handles SPAs and dynamic content, runs anti-bot bypass patches (--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled). Requires chromium or google-chrome installed. Returns title, full rendered text, HTML, and links. Use this when browser_open returns needs_js=true or for pages with DataDome/Akamai protection.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"URL to navigate to"},"wait_for_ms":{"type":"integer","description":"Max milliseconds to wait for page load (default 10000)"}},"required":["url"]}

tools.name: browser_cdp_eval
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the current Chrome CDP session. Returns the result value. Use for: extracting dynamic content, interacting with SPAs, reading JS variables, triggering events.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string"},"js":{"type":"string","description":"JavaScript expression to evaluate"},"await_promise":{"type":"boolean","description":"Await the result if it's a Promise (default false)"}},"required":["session_id","js"]}

tools.name: browser_cdp_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the Chrome CDP session to a new URL (reuses the existing Chrome process). More efficient than browser_cdp_open for multi-page flows.

tools.name: browser_cdp_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the current page in a Chrome CDP session. Returns base64-encoded PNG or JPEG.

tools.name: browser_cdp_close
tools.description: Close a Chrome CDP session and terminate the Chrome process. Always call this when done to free resources.

tools.name: browser_cdp_click_element
tools.description: Click on a DOM element in a Chrome CDP session using CSS selector. Scrolls the element into view, resolves its centre coordinates, and dispatches real mousePressed + mouseReleased events so JS onclick handlers and custom components fire correctly.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS selector for the element to click"},"index":{"type":"integer","description":"Which match to click if selector matches multiple elements (0-based, default 0)"}},"required":["session_id","selector"]}

tools.name: browser_cdp_type
tools.description: Type text or press a special key in a Chrome CDP session. Optionally focus a CSS selector first. Use key for special keys: Enter, Tab, Escape, Backspace, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, etc. Use clear_first to select-all and delete existing content before typing.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string"},"text":{"type":"string","description":"Text to type (printable characters)"},"key":{"type":"string","description":"Special key to press: Enter, Tab, Escape, Backspace, ArrowDown, ArrowUp, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, End, PageUp, PageDown, F1-F12"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS selector of element to focus before typing (optional)"},"clear_first":{"type":"boolean","description":"Select-all + delete existing content before typing (default false)"}},"required":["session_id"]}

tools.name: browser_cdp_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page or a specific element in a Chrome CDP session. Triggers real scroll events so lazy-loading, infinite scroll, and sticky headers behave correctly. Use delta for relative scrolling (positive=down) or x/y for absolute position.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"session_id":{"type":"string"},"selector":{"type":"string","description":"CSS selector of scrollable element (omit to scroll the window)"},"delta":{"type":"integer","description":"Relative scroll amount in pixels (positive=down, negative=up)"},"x":{"type":"integer","description":"Absolute horizontal scroll position in pixels"},"y":{"type":"integer","description":"Absolute vertical scroll position in pixels"},"behavior":{"type":"string","enum":["instant","smooth"],"description":"Scroll behavior (default: instant)"},"wait_for_ms":{"type":"integer","description":"Milliseconds to wait after scroll for lazy-loaded content (default 0)"}},"required":["session_id"]}
